name: Duketon Mining Limited
summary: Duketon Mining Limited engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral resources in Australia. The company primarily explores for nickel, copper, platinum, and palladium. Its flagship property is the 100% owned Duketon project located within the prospective Duketon Greenstone Belt, north of Laverton in the Eastern Goldfields mineral province. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
